questions.question: Discuss the applications of artificial neural networks in computer vision with specific examples.
Explain how ANNs are applied in natural language processing.
Describe ANN applications in healthcare and their impact.
keyPoints: Medical imaging: tumor detection in X-rays, MRIs

questions.question: Match neural network architectures to their most suitable applications and justify your choices.
keyPoints: CNN for image/spatial tasks: weight sharing captures spatial features
RNN/LSTM for sequential tasks: memory captures temporal dependencies
GAN for generation: adversarial training produces realistic outputs
Autoencoders for compression/denoising: learn efficient representations
Transformers for NLP: attention mechanisms handle long-range dependencies
